title: 6 months of CPI losses. Then I changed ONE thing.
description: POV: You've been losing money trading CPI releases for months. Then you discover this ONE smart money concept that changes everything. The CPI is dropping tomorrow - are you ready?
script: POV: Six months of CPI losses. Every release destroys your account. You chase every spike. Buy the breakouts. Sell the dumps. Then you discover order blocks. Smart money leaves breadcrumbs before CPI. Now you trade where institutions positioned. Not where retail panics. Follow R2F Trading for more setups.
